series_metadata.series_description: These records are reviewed in the preparation of the annual examination reports analyzing the financial condition of state-chartered banks and are prepared by independent auditors.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: paper copy in operating area imaged and indexed on computer, or next examination is completed. Upon confirmation that paper copy was checked quality and completeness, . ; Microform: microfilm in operating area as well as off-site storage facility next examination is completed ; Electronic: electronic files next examination is completed
retention_rules.disposition_method: Paper: Shred ; Microform: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
